text.title: Cognitive Walkthrough Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-task
step.action: Write the canonical correct action sequence as numbered steps.

step.name: recruit-evaluators
step.action: Pick >=2 evaluators; brief them on the user profile + frame discipline.

step.name: run-independent-walkthroughs
step.action: Each evaluator independently answers Q1-Q4 per step; records findings.

step.name: merge-findings
step.action: Discuss; merge duplicates; assign severity per finding.
